cpu_platform.description: Indicates the specific CPU platform used by the instance

creation_timestamp.description: Time when the instance was initially created in GCP

current_status.description: Shows the current operational state of the instance

effective_labels.description: Key-value pairs applied to organize and identify the instance

id.description: Unique resource ID for referencing the instance in configurations

instance_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the instance, useful for API operations

label_fingerprint.description: Tracks updates to labels applied on the instance

metadata_fingerprint.description: Tracks changes to instance metadata for consistency

self_link.description: Full URL for directly accessing the instance in GCP

tags_fingerprint.description: Tracks modifications to the tags associated with the instance

terraform_labels.description: Labels from Terraform used to manage the instance
